name: Banana Bread 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease the bottom only of a 9x5 inch or 8x4 inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, blend together the first six ingredients and beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients until just combined.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes, then remove from pan and cool completely.
8. Makes 1 loaf.
TIPS:
If desired, add 1 tablespoon grated orange peel or 1/2 cup flaked coconut.
For Honey-Banana Bread, substitute 1/2 cup honey for all of the sugar and decrease milk to 1 tablespoon.
For Apple Sauce Bread, decrease sugar to 3/4 cup, substitute 1 cup applesauce for mashed bananas, omit milk and add 1 teaspoon cinnamon or nutmeg with flour. If desired, add one cup shredded cheese with nuts.
